reference: Hi, thank you for reaching out to me. I really appreciate your concern. Once you are infected with viral hepatitis, you become immune to this infection, making the chances of reinfection from the same virus very unlikely, and sometimes not possible. You may see elevated enzyme levels, but this does not necessarily indicate reinfection. I hope this information helps you. Have a nice day.
text: Hi, thank you for reaching out to me. I really appreciate your concern. Once you are infected with viral hepatitis, you become immune to this infection, making the chances of reinfection from the same virus very unlikely, and sometimes not possible. You may see elevated enzyme levels, but this does not necessarily indicate reinfection. I hope this information helps you. Have a nice day.
